div.class: pfz-header d-flex align-items-end gap-3 flex-wrap mb-3
card-header py-2 px-3 d-flex align-items-center justify-content-between
pfz-separator-impersonal d-flex align-items-center gap-2 px-3 py-1

button.class: btn btn-sm btn-link text-secondary p-0 ms-1 pfz-kargu-del pfz-clear-btn
button.title: Plaza hustu

button.class: btn btn-sm btn-link text-danger p-0 ms-1 pfz-kargu-del

div.class: pfz-separator-impersonal d-flex align-items-center gap-2 px-3 py-1

t.t-foreach: [ { label: 'KARGUAK', rows: this.mintegiKudeaketak }, { label: 'ARDURAK', rows: this.mintegiArdurak }, ]

button.class: btn btn-sm btn-link text-danger p-0 pfz-kargu-del

div.class: card-header py-2 px-3 d-flex align-items-center gap-2 flex-wrap

button.class: btn btn-sm btn-link text-secondary p-0 ms-1
button.title: Bildu

button.class: btn btn-sm btn-link text-danger p-0 pfz-kargu-del

div.class: card-header py-2 px-3 d-flex align-items-center gap-2 flex-wrap
card-header py-2 px-3 d-flex align-items-center gap-2
